notes: Validated the crisp-warm local image mutation inside the real TRIBE pipeline after a manual local filter probe found it beat crisp-neutral.
The improvement is small but legitimate: adjusted similarity moved from 0.8629998557657745 to 0.8646997460750855 without target copying or hosted Flux.
The loop now infers already-applied local styles from generated PNG suffixes, so resumed local mutation does not waste the next turn reapplying the current style.
